title: CouncilSynthesis
description: Council orchestration run synthesis artifact with analysis, risks, and next actions

council_run_id.description: Back-reference to the council orchestration run that produced this artifact

known_facts.description: Established facts identified by the council

risks.description: Risks identified by the council with severity and mitigation

next_actions.description: Recommended next actions with ownership and priority

open_questions.description: Open questions that require further investigation

strategic_recommendation.description: Overall strategic recommendation from the council

synthesized_by.description: Avatar key that synthesized the result, or 'council'
